examples: The program allows you to retrieve items quickly by searching under a keyword.
Collaboration was the keyword: editors, designers, picture researchers and production staff worked closely together.
For ease of use, we define a keyword synonym that displays the customer name, but stores only the number.
They can be sliced and diced by photographer, subject, location, theme or any keyword.
Facebook, currently testing ads in its new Graph Search, is not offering keyword targeting yet.
